overview.description: The FT Vest Bitcoin Strategy Floor15 ETF - October (BFOC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund that seeks to provide capped gains on the spot price of bitcoin, while attempting to hedge declines greater than 15% during a one-year period starting October. The fund uses FLEX options to construct the exposure. BFOC was launched on Sep 30, 2025 and is issued by First Trust.
